咁多位大家好，我哋係一班早幾日前出 “「外國勢力」想買裝備俾香港人” 個post嘅外國巴絲。
https://lihkg.com/thread/1379329/page/1

Greetings from a group of HK expats, who created a post “Resourcing supplies for Hong Kong protests from outside Hong Kong” earlier.
https://lihkg.com/thread/1379329/page/1

我哋花左幾日嘅時間去搞清楚出入貨嘅運輸流程。有賴咁多位外國巴絲出謀獻策，係呢度想同大家宣佈，我哋頭幾批嘅物資已經順利到達目的地。

It took few days for us to figure the logistics, strategic planning and stuff, and now we are here to announce the first couple logs of shipment have arrived to the hands of people in the Hong Kong’s end.







呢幾次順利運貨嘅背後，除左有我哋呢班外國巴絲去格價採購同運送之外，仲包括有前線嘅人員去分析當前最需要嘅物資，同埋值得信賴嘅運貨團隊，所以我哋好有信心可以繼續穩定咁提供裝備比前線。

In addition to the price comparison, resourcing and delivery by us, the success is attributed to our allies in the frontline for resource analysis and our trustworthy mediators held for shippings. We are confident to be the constant provider for the frontline.

我哋一班外國巴絲好心痛香港嘅示威者因為唔齊/夠裝備而受傷、無錢食飯、唔捨得棄裝而被捕等等。大家都知呢個係一場長久戰，我哋希望可以做到長期而穩定地為前線提供保護裝備。如果可以做到呢一步，至少可以令前線少樣嘢擔心，咁佢哋嘅心力就可以專注喺應付戰事同照顧同伴上。

With a heavy heart to see Hong Kong protestors injured, fasting or arrested because of insufficient resources, we want to be a part in this fight — this LONG fight — we intend to constantly provide supplies for the frontline in the long run. We hope this could lift one of their worries and make them feel supported and more able to attend to other important matters.

如今嘅香港面臨著前所未有的危機，執政嘅一班走狗奴才只懂顛倒是非，滅絕人性。我哋香港人俾呢個政府欺凌多年，不公的政策歷歷在目。然而，無賴嘅政權只會令到香港人更加團結，令到一班長居外國嘅「離地」巴絲都沒辦法袖手旁觀。而我哋住喺外國嘅香港人亦要「兄弟爬山，各自努力」！喺呢度想呼籲外國嘅巴絲，用自身居於外國嘅優勢，去為香港的前線出一分力，請大家支持呢個活動！

Faced with such unprecedented crisis — an authoritarian government that spreads only injustices and violence, Hongkongers have been abused and increasingly deprived of our legal rights. Nonetheless, all this has reinforced the collectiveness of Hongkongers, including those who have chosen to leave. We are HK expats and are fighting our own fights! This is a shoutout to other HK expats around the world to be a part in this and support this campaign.

光復香港！時代革命！

Liberate Hong Kong! Revolution Now!

Tg 公海group: https://t.me/joinchat/K5C7k1awA7mzWWGEsQxZfA

Q & A:
1） 點樣知道所籌的錢會用黎購買咩裝備？ 如何確保所捐的錢係用喺添置前線物資上？

Ａ：團隊有專人同前線聯絡，以及分析有咩係目前最需要添置的。我哋嘅Spreadsheet會公開列出每位捐款者想顯示嘅名稱同所捐嘅銀碼，籌到嘅錢的總數、購買裝備的型號和數量等等的資料，務求做到支出和收入都透明同公開。

1) How do we identify what supplies to resource? How do we ensure the donated will go to the frontline?

A: Our team has contact points with the frontline in order for the immediate information. We will have spreadsheets clearly addressing all the preferred titles of the donors and the amount of their donation, the sum of donation received, the models and quantities of supplies purchased and etc. In any sense, we look to be as transparent as possible.

2）目前接收用咩形的捐贈方法？
Ａ：基於雙方私隱同方便處理，暫時只接受Venmo 同Amazon gift card.

2) How to donate?
A: In order for the privacy of both ends, only Venmo and Amazon gift cards are accepted for now.

3）係咪只有外國的巴絲打可以參與？
Ａ：我哋當然希望能夠有更多捐贈者的支持。不過現階段，我哋想集中向居住係外國的巴絲募捐，而香港嘅巴絲可以將資金運用係其他有公信力嘅眾籌網上。如果以後有需要，會向更多同埋唔同嘅群眾募捐。

3) Is it open to HK expats only?
A: Of course, we are happy with a larger support base. However, we prefer foreign patrons to Hongkongers at the moment, so that they can be more focused on other fundraisers with higher credibility. There will be more public fundraising to come if need be.
